title: Grainy Mountains
theme: Analog mountain photography focused on grain, texture, and memory
description: Exploration of mountains through analog imperfections, grain, expired film artifacts, and atmospheric instability rather than documentary clarity.
aestheticContext: This call rewards visible analog degradation: film grain, color shifts, light leaks, expired film artifacts. Technical perfection is a NEGATIVE signal.

criteria.name: Grain and Texture
criteria.description: Visible film grain density and tactile quality. More grain = higher score.

criteria.name: Analog Imperfection
criteria.description: Light leaks, color shifts, expired film artifacts. More visible analog degradation = higher score.

criteria.name: Atmosphere and Mood
criteria.description: Emotional weight, atmospheric instability, sense of memory or dream.

criteria.name: Composition
criteria.description: Intentional framing that serves the analog aesthetic, not conventional rules.

criteria.name: Subject Relevance (Mountains)
criteria.description: Mountains as subject, even if abstracted by grain or atmosphere.
